summary: Iteration 15: Verified auto-sync changes and sync/receive default values feature. All 11 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend features verified working including Settings page with 3 tabs, auto-sync (no manual button), connection mode indicator, and full navigation.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/sync/health returns ok:true (no auth required)
Backend: GET /api/sync/pending-count requires authentication
Backend: GET /api/sync/pending-count returns pending count with auth
Backend: POST /api/sync/receive rejects invalid sync_secret with 401
Backend: POST /api/sync/receive accepts valid sync_secret with empty sales
Backend: POST /api/sync/receive adds defaults for numerar payment (subtotal, tva_total, suma_numerar)
Backend: POST /api/sync/receive adds defaults for card payment (suma_card)
Backend: POST /api/sync/receive adds default empty items array if missing
Backend: POST /api/sync/receive detects duplicate sales by transaction_id
Backend: GET /api/bridge/download returns valid ZIP file
Backend: GET /api/ returns version info
Frontend: Login works with admin/admin123
Frontend: Connection mode indicator shows 'ONLINE (VPS)' in sidebar
Frontend: No manual sync button in sidebar (auto-sync is automatic)
Frontend: Settings page loads with 3 tabs: Utilizatori, Backup, Instalare Locala
Frontend: Sincronizare tab correctly hidden on VPS (only shows on localhost)
Frontend: Instalare Locala tab shows download button 'Descarca Kit Instalare (.zip)'
Frontend: Backup tab shows JSON backup and Excel export buttons
Frontend: Users tab shows user management table with add user button
Frontend: Navigation to Products page works
Frontend: Navigation to Stock page works
Frontend: Navigation to Reports page works
Frontend: Theme toggle works (dark/light mode)
Frontend: Logout button present
Frontend: POS page loads correctly with products
critical_code_review_comments: sync/receive endpoint correctly adds default values for missing fields (subtotal, tva_total, discount_percent, suma_numerar, suma_card, items, metoda_plata)
Auto-sync implementation is correct - no manual button, syncs silently in background every 30s when VPS reachable and pending sales exist
Sync banner is info-only (no button) as expected
ANDREPAU.bat single-click launcher exists at project root
Settings page correctly shows 'Instalare Locala' tab with download kit functionality
seed_data_creation: Created test sales via sync/receive endpoint for default values and duplicate detection testing (prefixed with TEST_SYNC_)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 15 verified all auto-sync changes work correctly. Key features tested: (1) sync/receive adds default values for missing fields (subtotal, tva_total, discount_percent, suma_numerar, suma_card, items, metoda_plata). (2) No manual sync button in sidebar - auto-sync is completely automatic. (3) Sync banner is info-only. (4) Settings page has 3 tabs (Utilizatori, Backup, Instalare Locala). (5) Sync tab only visible on localhost. (6) ANDREPAU.bat launcher exists. All existing functionality continues to work.

sync_receive_defaults.description: Adds default values for missing fields: subtotal=total, tva_total=0, discount_percent=0, suma_numerar/suma_card based on metoda_plata, items=[], metoda_plata='numerar'

auto_sync.description: Auto-sync runs every 30s in background when VPS reachable and pending sales exist. No manual button.

sync_banner.description: Info-only banner showing sync status (no manual sync button)

settings_tabs.description: Settings page has 3 tabs: Utilizatori, Backup, Instalare Locala
